info.title: Wslny API
info.description: API documentation for Wslny orchestration and admin endpoints.

get.description: Returns service readiness status for database and gRPC dependencies.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Route filter name or enum value: optimal/fastest/cheapest/bus_only/microbus_only/metro_only or 1..6

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Route filter name or enum value: optimal/fastest/cheapest/bus_only/microbus_only/metro_only or 1..6

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Route filter name or enum value: optimal/fastest/cheapest/bus_only/microbus_only/metro_only or 1..6

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Comma-separated grouping fields. Available: day, week, source, status, filter, selected_route_type

parameters.name: metrics
parameters.description: Comma-separated metrics. Available: requests, success_count, failed_count, success_rate_percent, avg_total_latency_ms, avg_ai_latency_ms, avg_routing_latency_ms, avg_duration_seconds, avg_distance_meters, avg_fare, unresolved_count, unresolved_rate_percent, long_walk_count, long_walk_rate_percent

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field from selected metrics or group_by fields.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Route filter name or enum value: optimal/fastest/cheapest/bus_only/microbus_only/metro_only or 1..6

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Route filter name or enum value: optimal/fastest/cheapest/bus_only/microbus_only/metro_only or 1..6

post.description:
Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

get.description: Returns all transport lines/routes with their type and metadata.
Returns details for a specific line including all stops in order and the route polyline.

post.description: Send either natural language text or exact origin/destination coordinates. Filter enum values: 1=optimal, 2=fastest, 3=cheapest, 4=bus_only, 5=microbus_only, 6=metro_only. Optional query params current_latitude/current_longitude can be used when text input does not include source location.
post.summary: Get route by text or map pins

parameters.name: current_latitude
parameters.description: Optional current latitude. Can be omitted/null/empty.

parameters.name: current_longitude
parameters.description: Optional current longitude. Can be omitted/null/empty.

error.message: could not geocode one or more locations

post.description: Returns all found route options (bus, metro, microbus, optimal) for the given origin/destination, not just the selected one.
Submit a rating (1-5) and optional comment for a completed route.

value.comment: Route was accurate, slight delay at transfer.

post.description: Search using destination text with current location and route filter. If destination is not found, response suggests closest known destination for user confirmation.
Confirms destination coordinates returned by search and retrieves route.

get.description: Returns details for a specific stop including all lines/routes passing through it.
Returns transit stops within a given radius of the specified coordinates, along with lines served at each stop.

FilterEnum.description:
* `1` - optimal
* `2` - fastest
* `3` - cheapest
* `4` - bus_only
* `5` - microbus_only
* `6` - metro_only

type.description: Selected route label. For filtered responses, this matches the requested filter name (optimal, fastest, cheapest, bus_only, microbus_only, metro_only).

filter.description:
Route filter enum: 1=optimal, 2=fastest, 3=cheapest, 4=bus_only, 5=microbus_only, 6=metro_only

* `1` - optimal
* `2` - fastest
* `3` - cheapest
* `4` - bus_only
* `5` - microbus_only
* `6` - metro_only
